$comment: IDD in-session enforcement — Claude Code hooks. PostToolUse runs the committed ast-grep checks against each edited file. PreToolUse is the commit gate: the same checks over the tree, plus verification of the judgment attestation against the staged fingerprint (deterministic — the gate verifies evidence, it never invokes an LLM). Stop is the completion gate: it verifies the attestation against the worktree fingerprint and blocks task completion with 'run /idd-judgment-review' when the review is missing, failed, or stale. Failures feed back as exit-code-2 stderr. Silent no-op when tools are missing or nothing applies, so adopting IDD never breaks a repo.

hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$f" ] || exit 0; command -v ast-grep >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; ls .github/idd/checks/*.yml >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; out=$(ast-grep scan --config sgconfig.yml "$f" 2>&1) || { printf 'IDD mechanical check failed — fix before proposing this diff:\n%s\n' "$out" >&2; exit 2; }

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' 2>/dev/null); case "$cmd" in *'git commit'*) ;; *) exit 0;; esac; if command -v ast-grep >/dev/null 2>&1 && ls .github/idd/checks/*.yml >/dev/null 2>&1; then out=$(ast-grep scan --config sgconfig.yml 2>&1) || { printf 'IDD commit gate: mechanical checks failed — fix before committing:
%s
' "$out" >&2; exit 2; }; fi; if [ -f .github/idd/bin/idd-gate.sh ]; then out=$(bash .github/idd/bin/idd-gate.sh gate staged 2>&1) || { printf '%s
' "$out" >&2; exit 2; }; fi

p=$(cat); command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; [ "$(printf '%s' "$p" | jq -r '.stop_hook_active // false' 2>/dev/null)" = "true" ] && exit 0; [ -f .github/idd/bin/idd-gate.sh ] || exit 0; out=$(bash .github/idd/bin/idd-gate.sh gate worktree 2>&1) || { printf '%s\n' "$out" >&2; exit 2; }
